meta.title: AI Solutions That Drive Growth | For French Tech & SMBs

hero.title: Unlock Your Business Potential

services.title: Ready-to-Use AI Solutions
services.subtitle: Fixed-scope services with measurable ROI and transparent pricing

service1.title: Automated Data Processing
service1.pitch: Eliminate tedious manual data entry by automating extraction from your emails, PDFs, spreadsheets, and forms.
features: Custom integration with your CRM or database
benefits: Up to 80% time saved on data entry
Elimination of human errors in critical data
service1.useCaseText: Complete automation of daily PDF invoice processing in your accounting software.

service2.title: Intelligent Knowledge Base
service2.pitch: Give your team an AI assistant that instantly finds answers in your company documents.
features: RAG technology with ChromaDB for accurate responses
Integration with all your document sources
service2.useCaseText: Smart resource center for company procedures and policies.

service3.title: AI Assistant for Customer Support
service3.pitch: Equip your support team with an AI co-pilot that drafts personalized responses, true to your brand voice.
features: Native integration with Zendesk, Intercom, Freshdesk
service3.useCaseText: Intelligent assistant that suggests relevant responses in Zendesk.

process.title: Our Collaborative Approach
process.subtitle: A step-by-step method that secures your AI investment

step1.title: Audit & Strategy
step1.text: We identify your most time-consuming processes together and define concrete objectives with measurable ROI.

step2.title: Prototyping & Validation
step2.text: Development of a functional prototype in 1-2 weeks to validate the solution before full deployment.

step3.title: Deployment & Support
step3.text: Production rollout with complete documentation and support options tailored to your needs.

questions.question: How do you ensure data security and GDPR compliance?
questions.answer: All our solutions integrate GDPR principles from the design phase. We prioritize local data processing, on-premise deployments, or certified cloud hosting.

questions.question: What systems can you integrate with?
questions.answer: We connect our solutions to your entire ecosystem: CRMs (Salesforce, HubSpot), databases, support platforms, and collaboration tools.

questions.question: What support do you provide after launch?
questions.answer: 30 days of included support, with optional ongoing maintenance. We also provide complete documentation and team training.

questions.question: What are your typical timelines?
questions.answer: Prototype in 1-2 weeks, final solution in 4-8 weeks depending on complexity. We first validate a concrete prototype to minimize risks.

executive_summary.title: Project: Invoice Processing Automation
executive_summary.problem_text: Manual invoice processing consumes 5-15 minutes per document and generates costly errors in financial data.
executive_summary.solution_text: An AI system that automatically extracts key information from PDF invoices and transforms it into structured, actionable data.

business_value.title: Business Value
business_value.proposition: Transform your accounting department with a solution that reduces invoice processing costs by 85% while providing real-time financial insights.

executive_summary.title: Project Summary: Intelligent Document Intelligence
executive_summary.problem_text: Employees spend 20-30% of their time searching for information. Critical knowledge gets buried in multiple documents, leading to missed information and inconsistencies.
executive_summary.solution_text: An Intelligent Knowledge Base that transforms how organizations interact with documents. Instead of manual searching, employees ask questions in natural language and get instant, accurate answers with verified source citations.
executive_summary.benefit3: Faster onboarding for new team members

technical_architecture.title: Technical Architecture
technical_architecture.step2: Smart chunking and vector embedding creation
technical_architecture.step4: AI-powered answer generation with source citations

technical_innovation.title: Technical Innovation Highlights

technical_innovation.feature2: Handles PDFs, text documents, and more

business_value.title: Business Value & Applications
business_value.app1: Quick access to project plans and deliverables

executive_summary.title: Project: Support Co-pilot - AI-Powered Customer Service
executive_summary.problem_text: Customer support teams face long response times (10+ minutes per ticket), inconsistent information across agents, agent burnout from repetitive drafting, and knowledge gaps when new agents join.
executive_summary.solution_text: An AI-powered Support Co-pilot that helps customer service teams draft high-quality, accurate responses 50% faster by combining artificial intelligence with your company's knowledge base.
executive_summary.benefit1: Reduce response time from 10 minutes to 2 minutes
executive_summary.benefit2: Ensure 100% accuracy with verified knowledge base
executive_summary.benefit3: Maintain brand voice across all customer interactions
executive_summary.scenario_text: "I can't login and have an important meeting in 30 minutes!"
executive_summary.response_point2: References login troubleshooting steps from knowledge base
executive_summary.response_point3: Shows empathy while providing immediate solutions

technical_architecture.title: Technical Architecture
technical_architecture.diagram: User Input → Streamlit UI → RAG Engine → GPT-4 → Professional Response
technical_architecture.diagram2: Pinecone Vector DB ↔ Company Knowledge Base
technical_architecture.step1: Intelligent knowledge retrieval using RAG with semantic search
technical_architecture.step2: Context-aware response generation with tone adaptation
technical_architecture.step3: Production-ready features with error handling and logging

technical_innovation.title: Technical Differentiators
technical_innovation.proposition: Unlike generic ChatGPT, our solution grounds responses in your specific knowledge base, prevents hallucinations by using verified information, and provides source references for every response.
technical_innovation.feature1: Grounds responses in your verified knowledge base
technical_innovation.feature2: Vector indexing for sub-second knowledge retrieval
technical_innovation.feature3: Tone detection, conversation history, multi-tenant architecture
technical_innovation.feature4: REST API for ticketing systems, webhooks, custom knowledge bases

process.title: Notre Méthode de Collaboration

step1.title: Audit & Stratégie
step1.text: Nous identifions ensemble vos processus les plus chronophages et définissons des objectifs concrets avec ROI mesurable.

step2.title: Prototypage & Validation

questions.question: Comment garantissez-vous la sécurité des données et le respect du RGPD ?
questions.answer: Toutes nos solutions intègrent les principes RGPD dès leur conception. Nous privilégions le traitement local des données, les déploiements on-premise ou des hébergeurs cloud certifiés.

questions.question: Quelles sont vos possibilités d'intégration ?
questions.answer: Nous connectons nos solutions à l'ensemble de votre écosystème : CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot), bases de données, plateformes de support (Zendesk, Intercom) et outils collaboratifs.

questions.question: Quel accompagnement après la mise en service ?
questions.answer: 30 jours de support inclus, avec possibilité de maintenance continue. Nous fournissons également documentation complète et formation de vos équipes.

questions.question: Quels sont vos délais de réalisation ?
questions.answer: Prototype en 1-2 semaines, solution finale en 4-8 semaines selon la complexité. Nous validons d'abord un prototype concret pour minimiser les risques.

executive_summary.title: Résumé du Projet : Intelligence Documentaire Intelligente
executive_summary.problem_text: Les employés passent 20 à 30% de leur temps à rechercher des informations. Les connaissances critiques sont enfouies dans de multiples documents, entraînant des informations manquées et des incohérences.
executive_summary.solution_text: Une Base de Connaissance Intelligente qui transforme la façon dont les organisations interagissent avec les documents. Au lieu de recherches manuelles, les employés posent des questions en langage naturel et obtiennent des réponses instantanées et précises avec des citations de sources vérifiées.
